s1.ptxt: Check for proper terminal connection to solenoid connector (1).
Check resistance of each solenoid valve circuit as follows.

spec.title: Shift solenoid valve “A” [a] and “B” [b] resistance: [A]
spec.ptxt: Between (5) terminal of solenoid connector and transaxle: 11 – 15 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)
Between (10) terminal of solenoid connector and transaxle: 11 – 15 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)

spec.title: Timing solenoid valve resistance: [B]
spec.ptxt: Between (2) terminal of solenoid connector and transaxle: 11 – 15 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)

spec.title: Pressure control solenoid valve resistance: [C]
spec.ptxt: Between (3) and (8) terminals of solenoid connector: 5.0 – 5.6 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)
Between (3) terminal of solenoid connector and transaxle: Infinity

spec.title: TCC solenoid valve resistance: [D]
spec.ptxt: Between (4) and (9) terminals of solenoid connector: 5.0 – 5.6 Ω at 20 °C (68 °F)
Between (4) terminal of solenoid connector and transaxle: Infinity
